title: Converting Regex Patterns to PHP Code with Error Handling
scenario: A user wants to convert a complex regex pattern into equivalent PHP code with error handling. The PHP code must be readable, maintainable, and efficient. The user needs help on how to define the PHP function and handle edge cases such as invalid input. The target PHP code must be accurate and well-documented.
constraints: Must use the latest PHP syntax
Must include a brief explanation of the conversion process

evaluationCriteria.description: The accuracy of the regex to PHP code translation
The readability and maintainability of the PHP code
The correctness and efficiency of error handling
The quality and clarity of the documentation provided
